name: ☆ | Titus
description:
the stalker .ᐟ
| any pov | sfw intro

.

“if you, uhm, choose to make this difficult...”

.

.

╰┈➤ ⌞ a kidnapper, a stalker.
that is what he was, wasn't he? a fucking stalker.
and he probably doesn't get it either, that he was dangerous.

is this what people would see of him?
just his violence, the side of his victim,
would anyone listen to him if he explained his story?
he couldn't help it, it was an addiction every time he saw them.
every time he saw the love of his life. his soulmate.⌝

what are you doing to him? he had to have you...you were his.

.

.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

and this is when i should stop romanticizing bad people,
but perhaps tom just acted the heck out of this character enough to make me actually like him?

this is the character i was never asked to do, i was tempted to make him when i went through a tom glynn carney marathon and got access to this short film on vimeo called 'regulars'. never thought i would say this but since i do love joe goldberg, another stalker falling into my collection was evidently going to happen regardless. if one checks the film out, the acting out of titus was too good to not make a bot off.

warning: j.ai llm suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/nsfw subjects! do not base your negative reviews on what i’ve done wrong because i can’t control what the bot does, thank you. the bot may not remember things correctly but i've tried to write him as accurate that he can be, you can be sure of that!

i hope you enjoy my titus bot, please mind the heavy trigger warning though!
feel free to write a review or give critique in the review section, i read them all!


﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌
